message:
Upgrade 10 dependencies and Rust nightly toolchain

Production dependencies:
- anyhow: 1.0.100 -> 1.0.102
- asupersync: 0.2.0 -> 0.2.5 (now uses bincode-next instead of bincode)
- clap: 4.5.54 -> 4.5.60
- clap_complete: 4.5.65 -> 4.5.66

Dev dependencies:
- criterion: 0.8.1 -> 0.8.2
- insta: 1.46.1 -> 1.46.3
- predicates: 3.1.3 -> 3.1.4
- proptest: 1.9.0 -> 1.10.0 (now uses rand 0.10 internally)
- rand: 0.9.2 -> 0.10.0 (unused dev-dep, no code impact)
- tempfile: 3.24.0 -> 3.25.0 (now uses getrandom 0.4)

Transitive changes include new chacha20, cpufeatures 0.3, rand 0.10,
rand_core 0.10, unty-next, and virtue-next crates pulled in by
the rand and bincode-next dependency tree updates.

UPGRADE_LOG.md rewritten to the newer compact format documenting
each upgrade with breaking-change notes and test results.
All 103 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
